name: 文本细读
subject: english
domain_name: 读者-作者-文本 / Readers, Writers, Texts / Readers, Writers, Texts
curriculum_points: Students will be able to perform a detailed, line-by-line analysis of a literary or non-literary text, identifying and interpreting the effects of specific word choices, imagery, and syntax.
Students will be able to construct a coherent interpretation of a text's local meaning and overall significance based on sustained attention to textual detail.
